design_intent: A warm, optimistic living room with walnut tones, tapered-leg silhouettes, clean-lined upholstery, and mustard-teal accents that nod to atomic-age mid-century charm without losing transitional comfort.

selected_pieces.product_name: Erommy 3 Seat Sofa with 4 Wood Legs, Modern Sofa Couch for Living Room, Bedroom, Apartment, Office
selected_pieces.placement_note: Centered on the main wall as the primary seating anchor, floated slightly off the wall, with the low back facing into the room and the dark wood legs fully visible.

selected_pieces.product_name: Tree City- 58" Upholstered Mid-Century Modern Faux Leather Square Arm Sofa Loveseat
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed opposite the sofa near the window side as a compact secondary anchor, angled slightly toward the coffee table to create a conversational grouping.

selected_pieces.product_name: Costway 2-Tier Round Coffee Table with Wood Grain Finish & Heavy-duty Metal Frame
selected_pieces.placement_note: Centered between the sofa and loveseat, aligned to the seating cluster, with enough clearance around it to show the round top and lower shelf.

selected_pieces.product_name: 7'X10' Vintage Tufted Distressed Area Rug Tan - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Laid under the entire seating arrangement, with the front legs of both seating pieces resting on the rug to visually unify the zone.

selected_pieces.product_name: 2-Pack Yarn-Dyed Patterns Gray Throw Pillows - Becky Cameron, Gray Yarn-Dyed Bengal Stripe / Yarn-Dyed Framed Stripe, 20 x 20
selected_pieces.placement_note: Layered on the sofa in pairs, mixed with warmer mustard pillows if added later, to introduce a subtle graphic note without overpowering the room.

selected_pieces.product_name: Square Linen Throw Pillow with Flange Neutral - Threshold™
selected_pieces.placement_note: Placed at the ends of the sofa and loveseat to soften the darker walnut and leather tones with a calm oat-linen texture.

selected_pieces.product_name: 36" x 24" Over the Mantel Mirror Gold - Threshold™: Rounded Top, Metal Frame, Wall Mounted
selected_pieces.placement_note: Hung centered above the sofa on the main wall to bounce midday light deeper into the room and add a warm metallic focal point.

selected_pieces.product_name: Sculpted Textured Metal Vase for Living Room Decor - Decorative Flower Vase for Home, Bedroom, and Office Desk Decor -11", Gold & Metallic
selected_pieces.placement_note: Styled on the coffee table as a single sculptural object, slightly off-center, to echo the mirror’s metallic warmth and the room’s atomic-age optimism.
